description: Free/ISP/webmail email domains that are NOT real-estate firms. A broker whose email is on one of these has firm = independent/unknown (canonical_domain NULL). The domain still never bridges identity by itself — only an identical email value does — so this list governs FIRM assignment, not human merging. Operator-tunable via app_settings.broker_free_email_domains (scripts.seed_broker_settings). Add the long tail of small CZ ISPs here as wrong-firm audits surface them.
